mapper.sql: id, route_number, route_name, sub_type, parent_route_id, start_stop, end_stop, down_start_stop, down_end_stop, is_loop, region_id, company_id, route_type, line_length_km, ticket_type, ticket_price, operating_hours, is_active, first_operated, last_operated, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT br.*, r.id AS r_id, r.name AS r_name, c.id AS c_id, c.name AS c_name FROM bus_route br LEFT JOIN region r ON br.region_id = r.id LEFT JOIN company c ON br.company_id = c.id WHERE br.id = #{id}

SELECT br.*, r.id AS r_id, r.name AS r_name, c.id AS c_id, c.name AS c_name FROM bus_route br LEFT JOIN region r ON br.region_id = r.id LEFT JOIN company c ON br.company_id = c.id WHERE br.is_active = 1 AND MATCH(br.route_number, br.route_name, br.start_stop, br.end_stop, br.down_start_stop, br.down_end_stop) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) ORDER BY br.route_number ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bus_route ( route_number, sub_type, parent_route_id, start_stop, end_stop, down_start_stop, down_end_stop, is_loop, region_id, company_id, route_type, line_length_km, ticket_type, ticket_price, operating_hours, is_active, first_operated, last_operated, remark ) VALUES ( #{routeNumber}, #{subType},
#{parentRoute.id} NULL , #{startStop}, #{endStop}, #{downStartStop}, #{downEndStop}, #{isLoop},
#{region.id} NULL ,
#{company.id} NULL , #{routeType}, #{lineLengthKm}, #{ticketType}, #{ticketPrice}, #{operatingHours}, #{isActive}, #{firstOperated}, #{lastOperated}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bus_route SET route_number = #{routeNumber}, sub_type = #{subType}, parent_route_id =
#{parentRoute.id} NULL , start_stop = #{startStop}, end_stop = #{endStop}, down_start_stop = #{downStartStop}, down_end_stop = #{downEndStop}, is_loop = #{isLoop}, region_id =
#{region.id} NULL , company_id =
#{company.id} NULL , route_type = #{routeType}, line_length_km = #{lineLengthKm}, ticket_type = #{ticketType}, ticket_price = #{ticketPrice}, operating_hours = #{operatingHours}, is_active = #{isActive}, first_operated = #{firstOperated}, last_operated = #{lastOperated}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
